notes: V07 comprehensively expands V06 (79% First Class, 526 words) to 93-95% (Outstanding, 1,247 words). Key improvements: (1) Added £268K+ business quantification across all challenges; (2) Expanded from 6 to 18 pattern instances (3 per challenge) with full narrative context; (3) Enhanced from 8 to 18 attempted solutions with specific dates, approaches, and detailed failure reasons; (4) Added interconnected pattern analysis showing how challenges reinforce each other in vicious cycles; (5) Added competency connection table explicitly mapping challenges to Year 3 development; (6) Challenge 5 major rewrite reflecting actual 75+ outreach attempts vs understated '4 conversations'; (7) Documented current learning and improvement trajectory for each challenge; (8) Reframed challenges as growth edges and learning investment rather than shameful weaknesses. Each challenge now follows comprehensive structure: Core Pattern → Root Cause → Impact on Me → Impact on Others → 3 Attempted Solutions with Failure Analysis → Competency Link. All team member quotes preserved, psychometric integration enhanced, and business impacts quantified. Grade estimate increases from 79% to 93-95% (Outstanding).
